name: Lamb Cannelloni with Walnut Parmesan Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Fresh chopped rosemary or 1 tsp Dry rosemary
2 tbsp Chopped parsley or 1 1/2 ts Dry parsley
recipeInstructions:
Cook cannelloni in boiling water until al dente. Drain and rinse with cold water, then set aside.
FILLING: Heat oil in a skillet. Add onion, garlic, rosemary and lamb. Cook until lamb is medium done. Add parsley, salt and pepper, and let cook slightly. Add egg and puree in a food processor. Place approximately 1 heaping tbsp into cannelloni shells. Place in a baking dish.
SAUCE: Combine butter, heavy cream, chopped parsley, Parmesan cheese, and finely chopped walnuts (preferably toasted). Bring to a boil and pour over cannelloni shells. Bake, covered, for about 15 minutes, just until hot.
